since_last: 40% of 101 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.48%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.89% · BTC -1.11% · Gold +1.62% · Nasdaq100 +1.93%. 40% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.48%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.48%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.82%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +13.51%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +13.51%, CHKP +3.10%, DELL +2.47%, HPE +1.73%, DV +1.68%. Laggards: SKHY -7.06%, GEV -4.99%, MGNI -4.29%, MU -4.15%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.63% at $122.76
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.63% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
